canonical_boundary: CH03 AR Event Layer. Field experience and closure entry. No new lore. No Canon Gap fill.

asset_boundary.ar_event: Field visualization and approved closure entry; does not create 云门 state.
asset_boundary.relic: AR output may reference Relic context; Relic progression remains deterministic from exploration.
asset_boundary.rights: L1 redemption refs stay outside ritual closure chain.
asset_boundary.digital_collectible: Share outputs are user-initiated; zero Relic progression effect.

events.name: 重逢场域
events.description: 记念场域·重逢到场处的场域体验。探索不是走向陌生，而是与曾被遗忘的连接再度重逢。
events.copy: 预览重逢场域，不请求 live AR 权限。
events.canonical_boundary: Field reunion visualization only; 再度重逢 is L2 chapter title, not new geography.

events.name: 重逢残印
events.description: 记念场域处探索记录的重逢印迹显现。残印是连接曾经存在过的证据，不是收藏数量。
events.copy: 预览重逢印迹粒子场域，不定义残印形成机制。
events.canonical_boundary: Does not define imprint formation mechanics; album C independent from prior chapters.

events.name: 重逢镜想起
events.description: 记念重逢镜·想起处的场域体验。每一次发现都是一次重逢，道路从不通向远方，道路通向自己。
events.copy: 预览重逢镜想起场域，承接第二处觉察。
events.canonical_boundary: Third law alignment only; no new Cosmology or lore.

events.name: 人间重逢场域
events.description: 记念谷里咖啡·人间重逢处的场域体验。一次服务、一杯咖啡、一次真实相遇，连接仍可与遗忘重逢。
events.copy: 预览人间重逢场域；结缘礼在探索完成后于结缘商城触达。
events.canonical_boundary: L1 redemption stays outside ritual chain; no medical or lineage claims.

events.name: 重逢修习引导
events.description: 记念云间书符·重逢修习处的场域体验。修习是想起连接曾被记存，不是获得新力量——符者，记念也，非咒也。
events.copy: 预览重逢修习引导场域，不宣称医疗、派系或传承。
events.canonical_boundary: No medical claim, magic system, sect, or lineage; no L1 rights popup at practice node.

events.name: 再度重逢·章成
events.description: 记念《再度重逢》章成 closure 场域。五处觉察已齐备，世界留下重逢印记，见证连接而非等级。
events.copy: 预览章成 closure 场域，可接续分享海报生成流程。
events.canonical_boundary: Completion is not ranking, level, combat, or proof of superiority.
